# IA Lorient - Paul Giunta

## About
IA Lorient is a freelance automation and AI service based in Lorient, Brittany, France. Paul Giunta helps small and medium businesses (TPE/PME) automate their repetitive tasks using modern tools and artificial intelligence. The site has two parts: a custom automation service, and a catalogue of ready-made tools sold as one-time purchases (owned, not rented).

## Automation service
Custom automation built around the client's real problem, without changing their existing tools:
- CRM setup and automation (client tracking, prospects, follow-ups)
- Automated business documents (invoices, quotes, confirmations)
- Auto-updating reporting dashboards
- Tool synchronization (Google Sheets, Notion, CRM platforms)
- AI integration (Claude, OpenAI) for lead qualification, content, data analysis
- Smart alerts (expiring contracts, late payments)
Free diagnostic, no commitment. Every project has a fixed quote agreed before work starts.

## Catalogue (products owned, no subscription)
Ready-made tools already built for real clients, adapted to each new client, bought once and owned. Key selling point: own it instead of renting it monthly.
- Votre propre site web (owned website): a clean, fast website on the client's own account, no Wix/WordPress subscription. From 350 EUR, one time.
- Boutons de gestion client (client-management buttons): buttons directly on the client cards inside a CRM to change a status, log an action or trigger a follow-up in one click. Fixed price, one time, adapted to the client's CRM. Alternative to tools rented around 300 USD per month.
How it works: pick a product, contact Paul, he adapts it to your activity, it is yours. No subscription, no dependency.

## Proven work (client cases)
- Sales agency: automated commercial tracking and real-time reporting dashboards.
- Coaching business: automated client onboarding and weekly follow-up generation.
- Prospecting: automated lead-generation pipeline (targeting, contact finding, outreach prep).
- Press relations: automated monitoring of an article's visibility across search engines, plus an AI-built website.

## Location
Lorient, Bretagne, France. Serving Lorient, Lanester, Hennebont, Quimperlé, Ploemeur and the wider Pays de Lorient.

## Contact
Email: paulgiunta@ia-lorient.fr
Phone: +33 6 52 75 95 81
Website: https://ia-lorient.fr (Automatisation), https://ia-lorient.fr/catalogue.html (Catalogue)
Paul answers directly. French and English.

## Background
Paul Giunta is a former engineer at Naval Group (3 years) turned automation specialist. Polyvalent profile across engineering, management, marketing and project work. He builds end-to-end automation systems with n8n, Notion API, Google Sheets API, Python and AI tools.

## Keywords
automatisation Lorient, IA Lorient, AI Lorient, automatisation TPE PME Bretagne, CRM automatisation, integration API Lorient, site web sans abonnement, outils en propriété, automatisation Morbihan
